name: Starter merchant aliases for transaction enrichment
description: Curated starter alias dataset for normal consumer purchases. Use deterministic alias matching first, then fuzzy/ML/AI fallback. This is not a complete verified merchant identity database.

matchingGuidance.negativeAliasesPurpose: Avoid false positives where brands overlap, e.g. Amazon vs AWS or Uber vs Uber Eats.
matchingGuidance.confidenceMeaning: defaultConfidence is only a starting hint. Your app should adjust confidence by alias length, exact/contains/fuzzy method, MCC compatibility, and user history.

merchants.notes: La granja is a generic Spanish phrase ('the farm'); keep confidence lower and prefer FL context.
Versailles is a common place name; aliases are anchored to restaurant/Miami forms.
La carreta is a generic Spanish phrase ('the cart'); many unrelated Latin restaurants use it.
Sergio's is a common restaurant name nationwide; bare 'sergios' intentionally omitted.
PDQ is a common abbreviation used by other businesses (car washes, POS vendors); confidence lowered.
Restaurant brand; do not match Ford Motor or dealership service descriptors.
Never match bare 'columbia'; collides with Columbia Sportswear, Columbia University, etc.
Navarro is a common surname; bare alias kept because statement forms show 'NAVARRO ###', but confidence lowered.

Medical cannabis dispensary.
